_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Analyze feedback to determine extent to which collection products and services are meeting requirements.
reference_document_element_description: Design, build, and publish BI dashboards and reports that meet defined consumer requirements for content, performance, accessibility, and refresh frequency.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AB domain. AB-T-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-K-016 (DQ, cosine: 0.514), DQ-S-008 (DQ, cosine: 0.486).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.8/10 (raw 0.378). Shared vocabulary: [requirements]. DCWF-only terms [analyze, collection, determine, extent, feedback, meeting] vs WIDAI-only terms [accessibility, bi, build, consumer, content, dashboards] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.856 (P=0.861, R=0.851). Balanced P/R — the 14-word DCWF element and 20-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.8%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Analyze feedback to determine extent to which collection products and services a" and "Design, build, and publish BI dashboards and reports that meet defined consumer". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.518 > STS 0.378 (gap +0.140). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [requirements] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.9%. Shared tokens: [requirements]. DCWF-only: [analyze, collection, determine, extent, feedback, meeting]. WIDAI-only: [accessibility, bi, build, consumer, content, dashboards].
